ingredients.item:
This vegan version of bún bò Huế has a sweet broth comprised of various vegetables and fruits. Instead of beef, you’ll use dried mock beef slices for the perfect balance of spicy, savory, and sweet.
SKILL LEVELAdvanced|YIELD8 to 10 servings
1 medium chayote, peeled and cut into 1½-inch (4 cm) cubes
1 medium carrot, peeled and cut into 1½-inch (4 cm) cubes
1 medium corncob, cut into 1-inch (2.5 cm) thick rounds
1 small jicama, peeled and cut into 1½-inch (4 cm) cubes
1 medium apple or pear, peeled and cut into 1½-inch (4 cm) cubes
1 gallon (4 L) water
2 ounces (50 g) rock sugar
1 tablespoon salt
½ cup (120 ml) vegetable oil, divided
2 blocks (28 ounces/800 g) firm tofu
ingredients.original:
This vegan version of bún bò Huế has a sweet broth comprised of various vegetables and fruits. Instead of beef, you’ll use dried mock beef slices for the perfect balance of spicy, savory, and sweet.
SKILL LEVELAdvanced|YIELD8 to 10 servings
1 medium chayote, peeled and cut into 1½-inch (4 cm) cubes
1 medium carrot, peeled and cut into 1½-inch (4 cm) cubes
1 medium corncob, cut into 1-inch (2.5 cm) thick rounds
1 small jicama, peeled and cut into 1½-inch (4 cm) cubes
1 medium apple or pear, peeled and cut into 1½-inch (4 cm) cubes
1 gallon (4 L) water
2 ounces (50 g) rock sugar
1 tablespoon salt
½ cup (120 ml) vegetable oil, divided
2 blocks (28 ounces/800 g) firm tofu

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons minced lemongrass, plus 5 to 8 lemongrass stalks, trimmed and bruised
ingredients.original: 2 tablespoons minced lemongrass, plus 5 to 8 lemongrass stalks, trimmed and bruised

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon minced garlic
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon minced garlic

ingredients.item: 3 tablespoons minced leek (white part only)
ingredients.original: 3 tablespoons minced leek (white part only)

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon minced bird's eye chili pepper
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon minced bird's eye chili pepper

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons chili flakes or powder
ingredients.original: 2 tablespoons chili flakes or powder

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon sugar
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon sugar

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon vegetable or mushroom stock powder
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon vegetable or mushroom stock powder

ingredients.item: 2 ounces (56 g) dried mock beef slices, soaked
ingredients.original: 2 ounces (56 g) dried mock beef slices, soaked

ingredients.item: 10½ ounces (300 g) mushrooms (straw, shiitake, enoki, or beech), stems trimmed and cut into bite-size pieces
ingredients.original: 10½ ounces (300 g) mushrooms (straw, shiitake, enoki, or beech), stems trimmed and cut into bite-size pieces

ingredients.item: 16 ounces (454 g) dried rice vermicelli noodles or 2¼ pounds (1 kg) fresh rice vermicelli noodles
ingredients.original: 16 ounces (454 g) dried rice vermicelli noodles or 2¼ pounds (1 kg) fresh rice vermicelli noodles

ingredients.item: 2 ounces (56 g) cilantro, finely chopped, for garnish
ingredients.original: 2 ounces (56 g) cilantro, finely chopped, for garnish

ingredients.item: 3½ ounces (100 g) leaf or iceberg lettuce, shredded or torn, for serving
ingredients.original: 3½ ounces (100 g) leaf or iceberg lettuce, shredded or torn, for serving

ingredients.item: 3 ounces (90 g) green herbs, (such as mint, perilla, cilantro, and/or Asian basil), chopped, for serving
ingredients.original: 3 ounces (90 g) green herbs, (such as mint, perilla, cilantro, and/or Asian basil), chopped, for serving

ingredients.item: 3½ ounces (100 g) bean sprouts, for serving
ingredients.original: 3½ ounces (100 g) bean sprouts, for serving

ingredients.item: 3 ounces (90 g) banana blossom, prepped and shredded, for serving
ingredients.original: 3 ounces (90 g) banana blossom, prepped and shredded, for serving

ingredients.item: 1 lime, cut into wedges, for serving
ingredients.original: 1 lime, cut into wedges, for serving

ingredients.item: 1. Place chayote, carrot, corn, jicama, and apple in a large stockpot, and then add the water, rock sugar, and salt. Bring to a boil, and then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer, uncovered, until vegetables are sweet to the taste (about 1 hour).
ingredients.original: 1. Place chayote, carrot, corn, jicama, and apple in a large stockpot, and then add the water, rock sugar, and salt. Bring to a boil, and then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer, uncovered, until vegetables are sweet to the taste (about 1 hour).

ingredients.item: 2. Heat ¼ cup (60 ml) of the oil in a small skillet over medium-low heat. When hot, add the tofu and cook until golden brown on all sides (10 to 15 minutes). Transfer to a cooling rack or paper towel–lined plate to drain, and then cut into slices.
ingredients.original: 2. Heat ¼ cup (60 ml) of the oil in a small skillet over medium-low heat. When hot, add the tofu and cook until golden brown on all sides (10 to 15 minutes). Transfer to a cooling rack or paper towel–lined plate to drain, and then cut into slices.

ingredients.item: 3. Heat the remaining ¼ cup (60 ml) oil in a medium skillet over low heat. When hot, add minced lemongrass, garlic, leek, chili pepper, bruised lemongrass stalks, chili flakes, sugar, and stock powder. Cook and stir until slightly golden (about 3 minutes). Remove from heat.
ingredients.original: 3. Heat the remaining ¼ cup (60 ml) oil in a medium skillet over low heat. When hot, add minced lemongrass, garlic, leek, chili pepper, bruised lemongrass stalks, chili flakes, sugar, and stock powder. Cook and stir until slightly golden (about 3 minutes). Remove from heat.

ingredients.item: 4. Using tongs or chopsticks, transfer lemongrass stalks to the large pot of vegetables. Reserve half of the cooked mixture in a small bowl to serve as a condiment with each bowl of soup.
ingredients.original: 4. Using tongs or chopsticks, transfer lemongrass stalks to the large pot of vegetables. Reserve half of the cooked mixture in a small bowl to serve as a condiment with each bowl of soup.

ingredients.item: 5. Add the mock beef slices and mushrooms to the remaining half of mixture in the skillet and cook and stir over medium-low heat until tender (2 to 3 minutes). Add tofu slices, stir gently, and then remove from heat and set aside.
ingredients.original: 5. Add the mock beef slices and mushrooms to the remaining half of mixture in the skillet and cook and stir over medium-low heat until tender (2 to 3 minutes). Add tofu slices, stir gently, and then remove from heat and set aside.

ingredients.item: 6. If using dried vermicelli, cook it following the package instructions. If using fresh, quickly blanch it in hot water if it has been refrigerated.
ingredients.original: 6. If using dried vermicelli, cook it following the package instructions. If using fresh, quickly blanch it in hot water if it has been refrigerated.

ingredients.item: 7. Fill one-third of each serving bowl with rice vermicelli noodles, and then top with mushrooms, tofu, and mock beef slices. Ladle hot broth over the top and garnish with chopped cilantro.
ingredients.original: 7. Fill one-third of each serving bowl with rice vermicelli noodles, and then top with mushrooms, tofu, and mock beef slices. Ladle hot broth over the top and garnish with chopped cilantro.

ingredients.item: 8. Serve with a platter of lettuce, herbs, bean sprouts, banana blossom, and lime wedges, along with the reserved condiment mixture.
ingredients.original: 8. Serve with a platter of lettuce, herbs, bean sprouts, banana blossom, and lime wedges, along with the reserved condiment mixture.
